understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete each level by moving the available selectable piece(s) so that every goal tile marked with a '+' is occupied by a piece at the same time, within the level’s limited step budget, ultimately progressing through all levels to finish the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Actions were performed by CLICKing a target grid coordinate. The currently selected piece attempted to move to the clicked position; successful moves could travel multiple tiles in a straight line if the route was clear, while moves failed (no position change) when blocked by walls/obstacles or otherwise invalid. The game tracked a finite number of steps remaining per level/run, decrementing on each attempted action. Selection persisted (the 'selected piece' kept being the one that moved), and winning required correct final placement (all '+' covered simultaneously).

The currently selected piece attempted to move to the clicked position; successful moves could travel multiple tiles in a straight line if the route was clear, while moves failed (no position change) when blocked by walls/obstacles or otherwise invalid. The game tracked a finite number of steps remaining per level/run, decrementing on each attempted action. Selection persisted (the 'selected piece' kept being the one that moved), and winning required correct final placement (all '+' covered simultaneously).
